title: FPS Overlay
description: A fully customizable, zero-bloat overlay. Tweak the layout to show exactly what you need to see for PvP and performance testing: FPS, 1% lows, ping, server TPS, and MSPT.
body:
# FPS Overlay ### Simple & Lightweight Performance Monitor [![Modrinth Downloads](https://img.shields.io/modrinth/dt/fps-overlay?style=for-the-badge&color=00AF5C&label=Modrinth)](https://modrinth.com/mod/fps-overlay) [![CurseForge Downloads](https://img.shields.io/curseforge/dt/1341801?style=for-the-badge&color=D15B40&label=CurseForge)](https://www.curseforge.com/projects/1341801) [![Version](https://img.shields.io/modrinth/v/fps-overlay?style=for-the-badge&color=orange&label=Latest%20Ver)](https://modrinth.com/mod/fps-overlay/versions) [![GitHub Source](https://img.shields.io/badge/GitHub-Source_Code-6e5494?style=for-the-badge&logo=github)](https://github.com/hihcam/fps-overlay-Fabric) [![License](https://img.shields.io/github/license/hihcam/fps-overlay-Fabric?style=for-the-badge&logo=github&color=blue)](https://github.com/hihcam/fps-overlay-Fabric/blob/main/LICENSE) [![Hichamdev | Fps Overlay Mod](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/94995d1e33e6080e8f1b781aa0615da508d9f148_0.webp)](https://url-shortener.curseforge.com/LHZ1p)
--- ## Choose Your Style v4.2 FPS Overlay now includes multiple display modes to fit any HUD preference: ### Default Mode v4.2 The classic, compact vertical box. Great for keeping all stats in one corner without taking up much space. ![in game](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5ba546f74c7d58f561031ba7d19f63df1b5df44f.png) ### Navbar Mode v4.2 A sleek, horizontal bar design. Perfect for placing at the very top or bottom of your screen for a cinematic, non-intrusive feel. ![in game](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/15f9390b95ba2d3afc5c6fed634a34135bf17898.png) --- ## As seen in AsianHalfSquat's Videos! v3.6 Featured in the **"Voxy vs Distant Horizons"** showcase. Get that same professional aesthetic with the built-in preset! ![AsianHalfSquat Feature](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/98cefb6ba826b3c2472c30824371712a9793e8b7.jpeg) --- ## Features * **Real-Time Stats:** Track FPS, Avg FPS, Ping, and RAM usage instantly. * **Fully Customizable:** Easily change the **size, position, and colors** via the config menu. * **Quick Toggle:** Hide or show the overlay with a single keypress. **(Default: `o`)** * **Ultra Lightweight:** Written for performance. It won't impact your frames. * **Cross-Platform:** Full support for both **Fabric** and **NeoForge**. --- ## Installation & Setup ### How to Install 1. Download and install your preferred loader (**Fabric** or **NeoForge**). 2. Download the **FPS Overlay** jar for your Minecraft version. 3. Drop it into your `.minecraft/mods` folder. 4. Launch and enjoy! ### How to Change Modes 1. Open the configuration menu (use **Mod Menu** on Fabric). 2. Look for the **Layout Type** setting. 3. Switch between **Default**, **Navbar**, or **AsianHalfSquat** styles.
